---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new rule type, check, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this related to a real incident?**
If yes, describe the incident briefly. The best features come from real pain.

**Describe the feature**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Proposed Deploy Rule (if applicable)**
```graveyard
- type: your_new_rule_type
  key: value
```

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.
